quarantinedRuns.reason: RSS/search route discovery admitted non-official/search-result hosts such as as.com, betexplorer, wordreference, apps.apple, and generated unusable fetch plans.
Strict-host probe used generated generic paths and produced proof-shape collisions/wrong-level evidence; output is diagnostic only.

replacementPolicy: Stop generic generated URL/path probing. Use proven official family adapters, official API endpoint discovery on confirmed hosts, or explicitly approved provider fallback with official cross-check.
